description: Executor ant (group member operasi-komputer-grup): deterministic — parses a power/app request and runs system_power/app_open over the loket. No LLM, no classifier.
author: @flowork-os

exposes_rpc.name: boot
exposes_rpc.description: Daemon: long-poll Telegram getUpdates dan dispatch reply via LLM. Kernel auto-call ini saat plugin kind=agent di-load.

exposes_rpc.name: handle_message
exposes_rpc.description: Standalone text handler. Apply persona, panggil LLM, balikan reply text. Bisa dipanggil langsung untuk testing.

exposes_rpc.name: handle
exposes_rpc.description: Group bus.broadcast entry — execute one power/app task.

sections.title: Telegram Bot
sections.description: Bot token dari @BotFather + chat IDs yang boleh chat sama Mr.Flow (cari chat_id lo via @userinfobot).

fields.label: Allowed Chat IDs
fields.help: Pisahkan koma. Group chat = negative ID. Personal = positive.
